name: Aggressive Procurement
description: A buyer-side procurement team that pushes for maximum leverage, stronger customer protections, and broad remedies before signing.

limitation_of_liability.fallback_clause: Supplier liability should be uncapped for confidentiality breaches, data incidents, IP infringement, and willful misconduct, with a general cap no lower than three times fees paid or payable in the prior twelve months.

data_protection.fallback_clause: Supplier will implement industry-standard administrative, technical, and physical safeguards, notify Customer without undue delay of any security incident, and cooperate fully in remediation.

payment_terms.fallback_clause: Payment will be due net 45 from receipt of an undisputed invoice.

name: Big Tech Legal
description: A scaled in-house legal team balancing policy discipline, precedent consistency, and cross-functional review requirements.

limitation_of_liability.fallback_clause: Aggregate liability remains capped at fees paid or payable in the preceding twelve months, except for fraud, willful misconduct, infringement indemnity, and breaches of confidentiality or data protection obligations.

security.fallback_clause: Vendor will maintain a written security program aligned to recognized industry standards and provide notice of material incidents without unreasonable delay.

ip_ownership.fallback_clause: Each party retains ownership of its pre-existing intellectual property. Deliverables created specifically for Customer will be assigned upon payment, excluding vendor tools and know-how.

name: Startup Counsel
description: Vendor-side counsel for a fast-moving startup that prioritizes closing the deal quickly while protecting balance-sheet, indemnity, and operational risk.

limitation_of_liability.fallback_clause: Vendor liability should remain within a 12-month fee cap, with any confidentiality or data protection carve-out subject to a narrow super-cap.

termination.fallback_clause: Either party may terminate for material breach after a thirty-day cure period, but customer convenience termination during the initial term requires notice and payment of committed fees.

payment_terms.fallback_clause: Invoices are due net 30, disputed amounts are carved out specifically, and suspension applies only to undisputed overdue amounts after notice.
